params.name: Silver Stag Vessel
params.description:
On Aug 6, 1400 BC, the Silver Stag Vessel was forged by Hittite Craftsmen.
This vessel, in the form of a stag, has thousands of years of history and gracefully displays the naturalistic features of Hittite Art. The main part of the drinking vessel is made of a dozen pieces of silver, and a circle of patterns on the edge of the cup mouth appears to depict characters in some ceremony. It is speculated that they may be celebrating a successful hunt.
params.skill1: [[File:Dungbeetle skill I.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion HP +1.5%
